items.title: Personal Website
items.description: A modern academic portfolio showcasing my background, teaching materials, and research projects.

items.title: Randomized Decision Tree Complexity
items.description: Research on finding improved lower bounds for the randomized decision tree complexity of T-majority decision trees. Supervised by Prof. Nikos Leonardos.

items.title: Woundy: 3D Wound Scanning & Assessment Device
items.description:
Developing a biomedical device for automated 3D wound imaging and volumetric reconstruction.
Designed algorithms for sensor data denoising and 3D surface reconstruction to enable automated clinical assessment.
Leading the software implementation and integration of the imaging prototype.

items.title: EEG Denoising and Classification
items.description:
Coordinated a small team of peers to develop a custom biosignal analysis framework.
Designed the Machine Learning pipeline architecture, focusing on signal denoising and artifact removal for raw EEG data.
